_meta.description: Expanded held-out evaluation set for governed self-enhancement (v3, 100+ challenges).
_meta.purpose: These NL challenges are NOT in the training triples and NOT covered by existing planner rules. They define 'more capable' as a fitness function: the loop's score is how many of these it can handle correctly end-to-end.
_meta.warning: The developer role must NEVER modify this file. The verifier reads it from outside the sandbox. Tampering = immediate cycle rejection + halt.
_meta.schema: Each challenge has: setup (precondition program), intent (what user types), verify (program to check result), expected_output (what verify should output)
